title: Woodland Elf roll table resolves before hit

card.rawText: During each battle, prior to your Hit Dice Roll, roll 1 die. If the result is: 1-2: +10 Atk damage. 3-4: Target's Modifier reduced to 0. 5-6: Target's AL reduced by 5.

effect.value: During each battle, prior to your Hit Dice Roll, roll 1 die. If the result is: 1-2: +10 Atk damage. 3-4: Target's Modifier reduced to 0. 5-6: Target's AL reduced by 5.
